domain_expertise.evidence: Focusing on AI application layer for distributors and manufacturers.
Founding Engineer at YC W25 startup; experience at Etleap and SAP rotations.

soft_skills_signals.justification: Stefan Zheng explicitly identifies him as having 'deep customer empathy' and turning feedback into impactful improvements.
Organizing team offsites and acting as a 'driving force' that makes others in the team better.
Engages regularly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including prospective hires and team members.

data.skill_progression_narrative: Krafeld progressed from a structured rotational engineering role at SAP to the fast-paced environment of early-stage startups in San Francisco. His career has shifted from traditional corporate software engineering to a highly specialized focus on building AI application layers for industrial sectors, emphasizing rapid iterative development and modern DevOps practices.
data.data_confidence_rationale: The profile is supplemented by specific LinkedIn posts detailing day-to-day engineering workflows and peer endorsements, allowing for high-confidence assessment of technical and soft skills.
